narrative:
Jackson Twp township has 2,114 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.6 percentage points.
